_doc: Copy this file to <version>.json and fill in the offset fields.
_build_id_note: First 8 bytes of the NSO build ID at offset 0x40 in the raw fs.nso, uppercase hex. This becomes the Atmosphere exefs_patches directory name.

patches._patch_note: All offsets are into the decompressed .text section (file offset - 0x100 if stripping NSO header). Data is ARM64 NOP = 1F2003D5.

IsGameCardInserted_false_branch._comment: NOP the CBZ/CBNZ Wn that follows the polling BL. Without this, fs cuts GCA+GCC rails on the very first polling cycle when no authentic card responds.

GetGameCardHandle_power_gate_branch._comment: NOP the CBNZ X0 that follows the handle-acquisition BL. Primary target from RESEARCH.md section 1.1. Result != 0 path leads to PowerOff chain.

GetGameCardAttribute_fail_branch._comment: NOP the CBNZ X0 after the attribute-check BL. fs validates the card type byte immediately after handle acquisition; failure here also triggers power cut even if handle succeeded.
